lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey there. What brings you here?

lines.speaker: Clerris
lines.text: This is the dense essence mine. The essence we gather here is used across Arceuus, and indeed all of Kourend. If you wish, you are welcome to mine some yourself.

lines.speaker: Clerris
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Clerris
lines.text: I have a question for you.

sections.title: If the player has maximum Arceuus favour

lines.speaker: Clerris
lines.text: We do not require any dense essence from you at present. Thank you for your support.

lines.speaker: Clerris
lines.text: The mages of Arceuus seek dense essence for their experiments. I see you have [amount] blocks; we require [amount]. Donations will be marked with gratitude.

lines.speaker: Clerris
lines.text: Your donation has been gratefully recieved.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, sorry, they can't have it.
